name: add_custom_timing_model
full_help:
add_custom_timing_model

Description: 
Custom timing model

Syntax: 
add_custom_timing_model  -from <args> -to <args> -delays <args> [-quiet]
                         [-verbose]

Usage: 
  Name        Description
  -----------------------
  -from       From pin
  -to         To pin
  -delays     Delays in ns
  [-quiet]    Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]  Suspend message limits during command execution

Categories: 
Timing

arguments.description: Suspend message limits during command execution
